reason: Cannot rewrite text-matching f2p tests to behavioral without breaking oracle. TestCSSBuildLoadersDefault exists in base Hugo with original test data that passes without the fix. The fix adds new test data to this same function, but Docker image is pre-built at base commit - cannot add fix test data to base. Behavioral tests (go test subprocess) therefore pass on both NOP and GOLD. Text-matching tests correctly distinguish NOP from GOLD but are not behavioral per judge criteria. This is a fundamental test design limitation: the bug scenario is only testable via Go source changes that add test data to an existing test function.
